Table summary. Current Treasurer duty area: Serve as elected officer accountable to the church.. Recommended primary home: Treasurer / Financial Officer. Supporting roles / bodies: Congregation, Nominating Committee, Finance Committee. Reason for split: This is an officer/governance function, not a bookkeeping task.. Open questions: What do the bylaws require for election, term, replacement, and interim service?. Current Treasurer duty area: Preserve and steward church funds according to approved budgets and policies.. Recommended primary home: Treasurer / Financial Officer. Supporting roles / bodies: Finance Committee, Bookkeeper. Reason for split: Treasurer should ensure accountability; Finance Committee should define policies; Bookkeeper should handle assigned operations.. Open questions: What specific review steps prove funds are being stewarded properly?. Current Treasurer duty area: Receive all contributed funds.. Recommended primary home: Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, offering counters, Finance Committee. Reason for split: Routine receipt recording is operational and should follow written controls.. Open questions: Who physically receives count sheets and deposit records today?. Current Treasurer duty area: Deposit contributed funds in designated bank accounts.. Recommended primary home: Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, offering counters, Finance Committee. Reason for split: Deposit preparation and documentation are operational; Treasurer should review controls rather than be the only doer.. Open questions: Who is authorized to make deposits, and should two-person controls apply?. Current Treasurer duty area: Disburse funds only with proper authorization.. Recommended primary home: Treasurer / Financial Officer. Supporting roles / bodies: Bookkeeper, Finance Committee. Reason for split: Treasurer should confirm disbursements follow policy; Bookkeeper may prepare payments after approvals are documented.. Open questions: Which payments require Treasurer approval versus ministry leader or committee approval?. Current Treasurer duty area: Issue checks and electronic payments.. Recommended primary home: Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, Finance Committee. Reason for split: Payment preparation is operational; authorization and review should remain controlled.. Open questions: Should the Bookkeeper prepare payments while Treasurer or another authorized signer releases them?. Current Treasurer duty area: Oversee online giving.. Recommended primary home: Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, Finance Committee. Reason for split: Day-to-day online giving administration is software/operations work; Finance should define controls.. Open questions: Who should have admin access, and what reports should be reviewed monthly?. Current Treasurer duty area: Oversee church credit/debit cards and manage issuance.. Recommended primary home: Finance Committee. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, Bookkeeper, Personnel Committee where accountability is involved. Reason for split: Card policy, limits, issuance, suspension, and review are financial-control decisions.. Open questions: Should shared debit cards be replaced with individually assigned credit cards or another controlled method?. Current Treasurer duty area: Maintain accurate, itemized records of receipts and disbursements.. Recommended primary home: Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, Finance Committee. Reason for split: Recordkeeping is a routine bookkeeping function; Treasurer should review record quality and completeness.. Open questions: What software will hold official records?. Current Treasurer duty area: Render monthly transaction reports to the church.. Recommended primary home: Treasurer / Financial Officer. Supporting roles / bodies: Bookkeeper, Finance Committee. Reason for split: Treasurer should present or support reporting as the elected officer; Bookkeeper can prepare report packets.. Open questions: What reports should go to Finance Committee versus business meeting?. Current Treasurer duty area: Prepare annual financial summaries for review and audit.. Recommended primary home: Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, Finance Committee, outside vendor.
